data.name: WHOREHAMMER 69 000
data.detailed_description:
In the grim darkness of the 69th Millennium, there is only... lust.

WHOREHAMMER 69 000 is a relentless, heavy-metal arcade breaker set in a universe where the enemies of mankind are as seductive as they are deadly. You are a Commander of the Holy Vanguard, a man armed with the Emperor's finest equipment, sent on a crusade to conquer the galaxy's most stunning women.

The heretics have erected blockades across the sector, and it’s up to your tactical mastery to break them down. Command your Holy Orb and wield your Power Paddle to smash through enemy defenses. Every sector you conquer rewards you with highly classified, fully animated encounters with alien matriarchs, seductive sorceresses, and the heavy-armored maidens of the Sisterhood.

⚔️ Tactical Advantages:

  • For the Imperium: Experience explicit, high-quality, uncensored scenes featuring gorgeous women in intense M/F (Male/Female) action. You bring the heavy artillery, and they take the impact.

  • Purge the Unclean: Classic, addictive arcade physics. Bounce the Orb, break the barriers, and crush the heretical blocks.

  • Heavy Support: Upgrade your paddle with blessed power-ups. Deploy multi-balls, plasma lasers, and explosive rounds to maximize your penetration.

  • The Golden Archives: A gallery mode fit for a Lord Commander. Replay your unlocked conquests and admire the "spoils of war" at your leisure.

  • No Retreat: Pure, straightforward arcade action. No complex skill trees or dialogue—just raw physics and immediate gratification.

The enemy's defenses are thick, but your resolve is thicker. Suit up, Commander.

data.short_description: In the grim darkness of the far future, there is only pleasure. A sci-fi parody arcade breaker where you smash heretical blocks to unlock explicit, uncensored videos of stunning sci-fi women. Wield your Power Paddle, purge the galaxy, and claim your spoils in pure M/F action.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
